summary: There is insufficient evidence indicating that escalating the apical dose improves patient outcomes in posterior choroidal melanoma treatments using 106Ru plaques; existing research does not link increased apical irradiation to superior survival or disease control. Thus, standard dosing regimens remain clinically supported without benefit shown by apical dose modifications.

Thus, standard dosing regimens remain clinically supported without benefit shown by apical dose modifications.. Answer choice: B
